title: habenaria unalascensis var. elata
intro: Habenaria unalascensis var. elata, also known as the Elate Spider Orchid, is a type of orchid native to the Aleutian Islands. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Habenaria unalascensis var. elata include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
